system.description: Replaces the drive-1 spike drive with a smaller system drive: the ship keeps drive-1 for maneuvering/system transit but cannot make interstellar drills. Lowers hull cost by 10% and adds free Power (1 fighter/2 frigate/3 cruiser/4 capital) and twice that amount of free Mass. This item's power value already represents that added free Power (accounting simplification); no separate mass bonus is auto-applied.
